title: ANC - Change Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech)
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting (Environment/Speech) selection does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Tap on ANC to open the ANC settings screen.
4. Under Transparency Mode, select either 'Environment' or 'Speech'.
5. Close the ANC tab by navigating back to Device Settings or Home.
6. Reopen the ANC tab by tapping on ANC in Device Settings.
7. Observe the Transparency Mode value displayed.
expected: The Transparency Mode value (Environment or Speech) selected in step 4 should remain unchanged and still be displayed after reopening the ANC tab.
